name: FocusGate
description: Enterprise-grade focus enforcement for the modern browser. Powered by NextDNS.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://api.nextdns.io https://www.google.com https://cdn.simpleicons.org https://icons.duckduckgo.com https://logo.clearbit.com;
